name: Vegetable Sausage
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Mixed vegetables (such as artichoke hearts, asparagus, mushrooms, broccoli or cauliflower)
1 tablespoon Fresh rosemary leaves OR 1/2 teaspoon Dried rosemary leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Roughly chop the vegetables into 1/4-inch pieces and set aside on a plate.
2. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the onions and cook, stirring, for 5 minutes.
3. Decrease the heat to low. Add the chopped spinach and cook until slightly wilted.
4. Add the remaining vegetables and cook for an additional 10 minutes, or until they are tender.
5. Remove from heat and scrape the mixture into a food processor.
6. Add the egg whites, bread crumbs, ground coriander, minced garlic, salt, pepper, and rosemary (or dried rosemary). Puree until smooth.
7. Stuff the mixture into sausage casings or form 2 long sausages in plastic wrap.
8. Poach the sausages in gently simmering water for 7 minutes. Remove from the water and drain on a plate. Let cool.
9. If using plastic wrap, remove it when the sausages are cool.
10. Cut the sausages into 6-inch lengths.
11. To serve, grill the sausages or place under a preheated broiler for a few minutes to crisp their skins.
